title: Rei Is death
wikitext:
[]: Rei I's death             Quote Post by feliwood » Sun Sep 12, 2004 2:33 pm In an EoE flashback, when Naoko was strangling Rei, there was a quick flash of what appeared to be Kawrou's face. Is there any kind of explanation for this?

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Sun Sep 12, 2004 2:38 pm Get some screen captures please.

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Sun Sep 12, 2004 3:53 pm It showed the link between Kaworu and Rei, aside from that, I don't know if it had any significance.

[]:             Quote Post by feliwood » Sun Sep 12, 2004 4:36 pm Esion- http://www.theotaku.com/evangelion/pictures/art/image_42.jpg was the pic of kawrou, don't know what else to show.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sun Sep 12, 2004 5:23 pm I think it's supposed to tie together the fact that in his mind, Shinji was killing Asuka the way Naoko killed Rei and the way he killed Kaoru. The strangling is a secondary context, especially since Eva can't really strangle a tiny human-sized creature without destroying it completely. The point is in the pattern.

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Sun Sep 12, 2004 7:04 pm Nice observation Hexon.

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Sun Sep 12, 2004 7:29 pm I just saw that scene, but i didn't saw kaworu anywhere Is the scene when Shinji strangles Asuka and then some scenes are shown of naoko strangling Rei I, and the eva 01 strangling the eva 03???

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Sun Sep 12, 2004 8:12 pm Hexon.Arq wrote: I think it's supposed to tie together the fact that in his mind, Shinji was killing Asuka the way Naoko killed Rei and the way he killed Kaoru. The strangling is a secondary context, especially since Eva can't really strangle a tiny human-sized creature without destroying it completely. The point is in the pattern.

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Mon Sep 13, 2004 7:41 am When Dr. Akagi is strangling Asuka you can see Kaoru's face in Rei's eyes I believe...don't have a screen cap handy, sorry...

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Mon Sep 13, 2004 11:12 pm bp32 wrote: When Dr. Akagi is strangling Asuka you can see Kaoru's face in Rei's eyes I believe...don't have a screen cap handy, sorry...

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Tue Sep 14, 2004 5:58 am Pretty sure it is in Death and Rebirth during the scene were Rei gets strangled to death--sorry, I don't have time to go back right now and look for a vid capture right now--let me see if I can find it later...

[]:             Quote Post by Cyanna » Tue Sep 14, 2004 10:04 am *googles* http://sc.groups.msn.com/tn/A5/02/Arikanime/48/787.jpg That's the picture you're talking about. It's too small to see the figure in her eyes but his face is in there. You can kinda make it out if you look closely enough. It's the same as the flashed picture in the opening of the Kaworu sketchy image on red. I know there is an enlarged version out there. I have seen it, I just can't remember where I found it. But the image is in widescreen so it's gotta come from one of the movies.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Sep 14, 2004 11:34 am I've never been entirely certain how to interpret that scene, but I've always thought of it as Rei forseeing the coming of the final messenger. There is a possiblity that she had at that point realized her angelic identity, and understood the relationship between herself and Kaworu, not to mention that she was falling victim to, or allowing her self to fall victim to the same fate as Kaworu.
